column1: Hey DeLuca, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
i'm interested in details about pricing and other packages. Our break is from the 16th to the 22nd
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book
cancun. i'm interested in knowing all the details about bothe resorts
Worddd for sure. How many ppl in your group?
That's solid! Which school we all from
Oh bet I went to salve lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
we're all trying to figure out what we wanna do and we just wanted to explore this option to see what best price wise
we wanna make a decision before january
Word I hear you. Things are def slim rn so we'll want to move on something as soon as we can
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Bet what's the best email to send to?
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
my bad bro I missed the text with your email. will send right now
just sent that over lmk if it came through
hey that email ever come through?
Liked “hey that email ever come through?”
yeah it did i sent it to my group we're looking it over
Def wanna get yall in on the discount
lowkey the discount that I added in there for you ended last week. just extended it to hook you up
yerr whats good bro, how we feelin so far?
it's gonna be 4 of us all together, i think we're all into it. how is payment process gonna work
okay bet. so its a $200 deposit that gets you all secured and locked in with your slot. each person handles their own payments
the remaining balance is due in 2 weeks, so Sun Jan 4

the next step, I set up your reservation for the 4 of you, you each jump in a slot, enter your details, and secure the spot with the deposit. the you get the two weeks to gather yourselves for the balance
want me to set that up rn?
sup brotha, did we wanna secure that option?
we're all just trying to figure out our money situation
i'll have an answer for you in a sec
how much is it in all?
If we roll with the 4 nights it's $566
Do you still have the email I sent over? The top lists out all of the items it comes with. It's just a lot to text lol
oh shi my fault. yeah i'll pre that
okay bet i think we're gonna roll with the 4 night
did y'all want to get things set up for tonight?
i'll see if they can. Christmas eve and all, everyone is with their family. Would we be chillin to set it up the day after christmas?
What's good bro, gonna set this up rn. 4 nights, 4 ppl, cancun grand o package right
just emailed that over. lmk if anyone needs any help navigating through
the email has a breakdown of how to get on
should i just forward the email to the others
yessir just send them the link
is there a link to get access to look at the off resort event tickets
not a link specifically but I'll tell you more about it and then lmk if you want them added in. you can add those in any time between now and 2 days before your trip

the party pass comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at the nightclub events off the resort. venues are D'Cave, Mandala, Mandala Beach Club, Coco Bongo, Rakata, Vaquita, and the open bar Booze Cruise
Liked “not a link specifically but I'll tell you more about it and then lmk if you want them added in. you can add those in any time between now and 2 days before your trip”
for 3 events I can hook it up for $200
theres also a 4 event and 5 event option
yoo whats good brotha, did the other plan on hopping on that res?
yeah. we had to find a fourth agian because our boy backed out last minute
okay bet. right now its just you in there we'll want to slide the others in asap to get things going
we found our fourth they gonna do it tmr
my boy is trying to do it right now. but my other boy reserved a spot twice by accident I'm trying to take it off so my friend can reserve his spot
can yall take it off or do i gotta do it somehow through his account
Yea we can take it off. Which name?
yoyo can you ask Jacob to get his flight info in, need it for airport transfers
okay i'll get him to right now. What's good with the trip and everything happening there currently? Does it look like it's going to be canceled
Everything is good bro, U.S. lifted all travel restrictions and all our vendors and hotels are operating as normal
hey bro is Jacob on the same flight as you?
no i'm getting him to do it. He keeps putting it off
word yea we dont want him stranded at the airport lol
he's at an appointment right now i'll get him to do it after
are we still able to get the party package?
we can do it still. you all want to add it on?
is it the same price if we got it in on the resort and got it compared to now
my b I missed your last response. im honestly not sure how much itll be on site. but I would do it now while you can so you have everything you need already settled
just lmk which we want to add on. I saw a few people added on a 3 night and 4 night
prob gonna get booze cruise but weather gonna be shit
it shows rain but typically itll shower for a short period of time
are the party passes sold out
you can buy it on site when you get there at our Go Blue hospitality desk
tmr when should check out? our flights at 1
Check out is by 11 but your shuttle time may be earlier than that
If you don't have it yet slide down to the lobby to get your time from the go blue tours staff
